description: Frequently Asked Questions page with expandable accordion sections

userStories.title: FAQ Accordion Component
userStories.description: Create a reusable Accordion component at src/components/ui/accordion.tsx that expands/collapses to show answers

userStories.title: FAQ Page with Questions
userStories.description: Create FAQ page at src/app/faq/page.tsx using the Accordion component with 5-6 sample questions and answers
acceptanceCriteria: Questions relate to the site/Mateo content

userStories.title: Add FAQ to Navigation
userStories.description: Add FAQ link to the site header navigation
acceptanceCriteria: FAQ link appears in header navigation

userStories.title: Restore FAQ Link in Header (Regression Fix)
userStories.description: The FAQ link was removed from header during FD-013 redesign. Restore it in the navLinks array in src/components/layout/header.tsx between Exclusive and Contact.
acceptanceCriteria: FAQ link appears in header navigation (desktop and mobile)
Positioned between Exclusive and Contact in navLinks array

userStories.title: ScrollReveal Stagger Animations on FAQ Page
userStories.description: Wrap FAQ page heading and accordion items in ScrollReveal/ScrollRevealContainer from src/components/animation/ScrollReveal.tsx for staggered entrance animations per FD-026 spec.
acceptanceCriteria: Accordion items animate in with staggered fadeUp on scroll
Page heading animates in on load

userStories.title: FAQ Category Groupings with Section Headings
userStories.description: Organize FAQ items into 2-3 logical categories (About Mateo, Getting Started, Community) with section headings per FD-026 spec.
acceptanceCriteria: FAQs organized into at least 2 categories
Each category has a visible section heading
Dark styling consistent across all category accordions

userStories.title: Use PageLayout Wrapper on FAQ Page
userStories.description: Replace raw div layout with PageLayout component from src/components/layout/PageLayout.tsx for consistency with other pages. Remove direct GradientMesh import.

userStories.title: Accordion Accessibility Improvements
userStories.description: Add ARIA attributes to accordion component: aria-controls, role=region, aria-labelledby, and unique ids via React useId().
acceptanceCriteria: Buttons have aria-controls pointing to content panel id
Content panels have role=region and aria-labelledby
